query: This repo keeps workflow templates under templates/ and materializes them into .github/workflows. Please add a new workflow_call asset and wire its live copy correctly.
Can you decide whether this GitHub Actions file belongs in templates/reusable-workflows or templates/starter-workflows, then update the manifests and materialized copies?
We renamed a reusable workflow template. Update the materialization manifest, any starter refs, and make sure .github/workflows stays rendered from templates.
Please clean up this repo so every live .github/workflows file has a canonical source under templates/ and document the rule for future agents.
This repo uses templates/reusable-workflows and templates/starter-workflows. Add a trigger workflow that should remain reusable as a template and materialize the live copy.
Can you patch our GitHub Actions workflow? The repo has a source-library layout and we need to keep starter-template pinned uses refs aligned with the reusable workflow source.
Set up CI for my app from scratch with GitHub Actions.
Check whether this repo is ahead or behind origin/main and push if safe.
Write docs for our API and tidy the README.
Fix unresolved CodeRabbit PR comments in this branch.
I need a reusable GitHub Actions workflow, but this repo does not use any templates/ source-library pattern.
Create a new OpenClaw skill for PDF editing.
